archimate:WorkPackage.name: Work Package 2 - Core Banking System Migration
archimate:WorkPackage.documentation:
Cakupan: Migrasi CBS legacy ke platform microservices modern berbasis cloud-native, parallel running, dan cutover bertahap.
Durasi: 6 bulan (TW2-TW5)
Prioritas: Tinggi
Target Plateau: Target Architecture
Menghasilkan: D2 - CBS Microservices Platform
Memicu: CBS Parallel Running, CBS Cutover
Menyelesaikan: GAP-2, GAP-3
